settings.title: How Our Installation Service Works
settings.content:
Step-by-Step Installation Process

  • Schedule: Book an appointment at your convenience (same-day or next-day available)
  • Consultation: Our technician surveys the site and discusses your needs
  • Preparation: We ensure all materials and tools are ready
  • Installation: Expert technicians complete the work with care
  • Testing: We test all installations to ensure proper functioning
  • Documentation: Receive invoice, warranty card, and usage instructions

Our Quality Promise

  • ✓ Certified technicians with 5+ years experience
  • ✓ Quality materials and tools from trusted suppliers
  • ✓ 1-year workmanship warranty on all installations
  • ✓ Professional, courteous service
  • ✓ Cleanup after job completion
  • ✓ 24/7 support for post-installation issues

* Prices are for Kathmandu Valley. Travel charges may apply for areas outside Kathmandu.
